description_long: This is a rectangular 1-liter juice carton with a predominantly blue and white color scheme, featuring the Faragello brand prominently on the front. The front and back panels display images of sliced guava fruit, indicating the guava flavor of the juice inside. The packaging includes detailed product information, such as 'Guava Premium Nectar' and 'Nectar Premium', along with a red and white brand logo. One side panel contains a comprehensive nutrition facts table, while the opposite side displays multilingual product information and a barcode. The carton is made of laminated paperboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness, and is sealed at the top with a small, flat closure. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of commercial juice cartons.
description: A blue and white 1-liter Faragello guava juice carton with guava fruit images, nutrition facts, and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello brand, guava fruit images, and 'Goyave Nectar Premium' text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutrition facts panel and additional product information.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with 'Guava Premium Nectar' text and guava fruit images, similar to view 0 but with slight text variation.
description_view_3: Side view with multilingual product information and a barcode at the bottom.
